title: Portugal Advances as Clean Energy Leader with Major Wind-to-Hydrogen Project in the Algarve and Sines
content: Portugal is taking a significant leap toward becoming a key European hub for clean energy production and export, as the international consortium MadoquaPower2X advances plans for the largest wind farm ever proposed in the Algarve. This project is a critical component of a broader â‚¬1.3 billion green hydrogen initiative in Sines, which positions the country at the forefront of the energy transition in Europe.
author: Analysts Account
